issues.issue_description: Multi-factor authentication is not enforced on privileged administrator accounts, exposing critical systems to credential-based attacks.
issues.evidence_criteria: Screenshot of admin account settings panel showing MFA enforced for all accounts with administrative privileges, dated within the last 30 days.
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence evaluated — confidence too low to auto-close. Escalated to analyst.
issues.agent_reasoning: Vendor submitted a policy document stating MFA is required, but did not provide a screenshot or config export demonstrating MFA is actively enforced on admin accounts.
issues.missing: Screenshot or configuration export showing MFA actively enforced on admin-privileged accounts.

audit_trail.action: Issue created — MFA gap identified during quarterly audit.
Remediation request email sent to security@acmecloud.com.
Vendor reply received. Evidence extracted: 1 PDF attachment.
RAG lookup completed for IAM-001. Gemini evaluation initiated.
Evaluation complete. Scores: relevance=78, mapping=61, sufficiency=55. Decision: ESCALATE.
Issue escalated to human analyst. Notification email sent.

issues.issue_description: Encryption at rest is not confirmed for customer data stored in vendor cloud infrastructure. Vendor SIG questionnaire response was incomplete for section 7.3.
issues.evidence_criteria: Configuration export or screenshot from cloud storage provider confirming AES-256 encryption at rest is enabled on all buckets holding customer data.
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence evaluated — all scores above threshold. Issue auto-closed.
issues.agent_reasoning: Vendor provided an AWS S3 console screenshot showing AES-256 encryption enabled on all three customer data buckets, dated February 2026.

audit_trail.action: Issue created — encryption gap flagged from incomplete SIG response section 7.3.
Remediation request email sent to compliance@datavault.io.
Vendor reply received. Evidence extracted: 1 PNG screenshot attachment.
RAG lookup completed for ENC-003. Gemini evaluation initiated.
Evaluation complete. Scores: relevance=96, mapping=92, sufficiency=94. Decision: SUFFICIENT.
Issue closed. Vendor notified. Audit log sealed.

issues.issue_description: Vendor has not demonstrated that inbound access to production systems is restricted to approved IP ranges. Firewall rules were not included in the last security assessment.
issues.evidence_criteria: Export of current firewall ruleset or screenshot of network security group settings showing only approved IP ranges permitted inbound on ports 22, 443, and 3389.
issues.agent_last_action: Remediation request email sent. Awaiting vendor response.

audit_trail.action: Issue created — firewall rules missing from security assessment.
Remediation request email sent to infosec@netsecure.co.uk.

issues.issue_description: Vendor has not provided evidence of a formal vulnerability management program including regular scanning and patch cadence within 30 days of critical CVE disclosure.
issues.evidence_criteria: Most recent vulnerability scan report (dated within 60 days) from an approved scanning tool showing critical and high findings, plus documented evidence of patch completion within 30 days for critical CVEs.
issues.agent_last_action: Vendor reply received. Evidence under evaluation by agent.

audit_trail.action: Issue created — vulnerability management evidence requested.
Remediation request email sent to risk@supplylinkglobal.com.
Vendor reply received. Evidence extracted: 1 PDF scan report, 1 PNG patch log screenshot.
RAG lookup completed for VUL-005. Gemini evaluation in progress.

issues.issue_description: No evidence provided that vendor maintains a tested business continuity plan covering their core services. Last BCP test date is unknown.
issues.evidence_criteria: Copy of current Business Continuity Plan plus evidence of a BCP test conducted within the last 12 months (test summary report, after-action review, or signed CISO attestation).
issues.agent_last_action: Insufficient evidence submitted. Follow-up email sent specifying missing items.
issues.agent_reasoning: Vendor submitted a BCP document but provided no evidence of a test having been conducted. The control requires both the plan and proof of testing.
issues.missing: Evidence of BCP test conducted within the last 12 months — test summary report, after-action review, or signed CISO attestation.

audit_trail.action: Issue created — BCP evidence missing from vendor risk profile.
Remediation request email sent to security@cloudbase.systems.
Vendor reply received. Evidence extracted: 1 PDF BCP document.
RAG lookup completed for BCM-004. Gemini evaluation initiated.
Evaluation complete. Scores: relevance=82, mapping=44, sufficiency=38. Decision: INSUFFICIENT.
Follow-up email sent specifying missing BCP test evidence.

issues.issue_description: Vendor access logs for systems handling client data are not being retained for the minimum required period of 12 months, creating a gap in forensic auditability.
issues.evidence_criteria: Screenshot of logging configuration showing retention policy set to minimum 12 months for all systems processing client data, or export from SIEM confirming retention settings.
issues.agent_last_action: Issue created. Pending next agent cycle to send remediation email.

audit_trail.action: Issue created — log retention gap identified during ISO 27001 gap assessment.
